cn_title: 《雷曼传奇》重制版泄露：发售日、定价及《光与影：33号远征队》联动
opus_summary: 泄露信息显示育碧正在制作《雷曼传奇：重述》，计划10月1日发售，登陆PS5和Nintendo Switch 2实体版。新版增加了3D关卡、《Astro Bot》和《光与影：33号远征队》角色联动，并支持在线四人合作，定价39.99美元。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft is cooking up a fresh version of its brilliant platformer Rayman Legends for launch later this year, leaks suggest.
paragraphs.cn: 泄露信息显示，育碧正在为其出色的平台游戏《雷曼传奇》打造全新版本，计划于今年晚些时候发售。

paragraphs.en: Rayman Legends Retold, as this new version will be known, is reportedly set to arrive on October 1, with a physical version available for PlayStation 5 and Nintendo Switch 2.
paragraphs.cn: 这个名为《雷曼传奇：重述》的新版本据报道定于10月1日推出，PS5和Nintendo Switch 2将有实体版发售。

paragraphs.en: That's according to Dealabs' ever-reliable billbil-kun, who has suggested that the game should be revealed at some point next week. Other leaks have suggested the game could pop up in Sony's big State of Play presentation, scheduled for June 2.
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息来自Dealabs上一贯可靠的爆料人billbil-kun，他暗示游戏可能在下周某个时候正式公布。其他泄露信息则指出，这款游戏可能会出现在索尼定于6月2日举行的State of Play大型发布会上。

paragraphs.en: According to N1Up, Ubisoft's 2.5D platformer has been expanded with several 3D sections, as well as character crossovers that are set to feature friendly faces from Astro Bot and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. Four-player co-op will also now be available online, after previously being a local-only option.
paragraphs.cn: 据N1Up报道，育碧的这款2.5D平台游戏新增了多个3D关卡段落，还加入了角色联动——将出现来自《Astro Bot》和《光与影：33号远征队》的熟悉面孔。此前仅限本地的四人合作模式现在也将支持在线游玩。

paragraphs.en: Price-wise, Rayman Legends Retold is reportedly set to launch at $39.99 — an attractive cost for one of the best side-scrollers ever made, even counting all those with Mario. Released back in 2013, it is the final mainline Rayman game directed by the character's creator Michel Ancel, and a demonstration of his former Ubisoft Montpellier studio at the height of its powers.
paragraphs.cn: 价格方面，《雷曼传奇：重述》据报道定价39.99美元——对于有史以来最优秀的横版卷轴游戏之一来说，这个价格相当有吸引力，哪怕把所有马力欧游戏算在内也不遑多让。原作于2013年发售，是角色创造者Michel Ancel执导的最后一款雷曼正统作品，也是他曾任职的育碧蒙彼利埃工作室巅峰实力的展现。

paragraphs.en: We'll be keeping a close eye out for full confirmation of Rayman Legends Retold next week — be sure to join us for live coverage of PlayStation's big State of Play event on June 2 for all the announcements.
paragraphs.cn: 我们将密切关注下周《雷曼传奇：重述》的正式确认——6月2日PlayStation State of Play发布会的所有公告，敬请关注我们的实时报道。
